title: eriogonum compositum var. lancifolium
intro: Eriogonum compositum var. lancifolium, also known as the Buckwheat Sulfur Clover or Sulfur Buckwheat Sulfur Clover, is a plant species that belongs to the Polygonaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high sulfur content, which is believed to have antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Eriogonum compositum var. lancifolium has been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. It can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and salves, and is often used topically to promote wound healing and soothe irritated skin.
